chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.84 of 2023 Muhammad Qasim Jamali Versus Learned Court of IVth Addl. District & Sessions Judge East & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 4499/23 2. For orders on CMA 4500/23 3. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 4. For orders on CMA 4501/23 5. For hearing of main case. 6. For orders on CMA 4502/23 Dated: 23.10.2023 Mr. Muhammad Ali Phulpoto for appellant. -.-.- Appellant has impugned an order of 14.10.2023 passed in a summary suit bearing No.119 of 2023 wherein within a time frame provided by law, leave application was not filed. The notices of the suit were served and summons were issued to the defendant (appellant herein) under summary chapter. Previously counsel namely Raees Ahmed Khan filed his Vakalatnama whereafter present counsel took over the brief. He never attempted to file leave application within the time provided by law, as the same was also not filed by previous counsel. In fact he sought further time, which was neither permissible nor could be granted under the law. Hence, we do not see any reason to interfere in the order passed by learned IV-Additional District Judge Karachi East in the aforesaid summary suit and in consequence whereof this First Appeal is dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
